docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,192.41 FILED BY ESCOBAR, CANDELARIA AS TO DEFENDANT BERTOLOZZI, RUDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-10-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
